market_pulse: Competitors (XS, Encore, OMNIA, Zouk) are deploying major talent bookings and Breakaway Takeover events; LIV is in post-EDC lull with limited June announcements visible on social.

content_gaps.description: Competitors are prominently featuring major artists (The Chainsmokers, Kaskade, Major Lazer, Tiësto, Steve Aoki, RL Grime, Bolo) in June bookings; LIV's June lineup is not yet prominently featured on social channels.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch talent announcement campaign on IG/TT for June resident DJs and guest performers; emphasize exclusivity and VIP experiences.

content_gaps.description: Competitors' posts show high engagement from attendee UGC (outfit posts, pool party clips, DJ reactions); LIV posts are lower-engagement festival recaps.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch hashtag campaign (#LIVJune2026) to incentivize UGC; repost best attendee content to boost community engagement.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (esp. Encore, Zouk) are posting BTS prep, DJ booth setups, and artist arrivals; LIV's BTS content is sparse.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create BTS Reels/TikToks: DJ arrivals, sound check prep, VIP cabana setup, pool party staging.
